questionHtml: Deduce the relationship between the concentration of N2O5 and the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
« rate of reaction is directly» proportional to/∝[N2O5]
OR
doubling concentration doubles rate ✔


Do not accept “rate increases as concentration increases”/ positive correlation

Accept linear

meta.title: Deduce the relationship between the concentration of N2O5 and the rate of reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
